---
title: "AWS 基本介紹"
date: "2026-03-20"
---

# AWS 基本

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Region & AZ

:::

## MFA

## access key

## AWS CLI & SDK

## cloudshell

## AWS budget

---

# IAM

## IAM users

## IAM groups

## IAM policies

## IAM role

## IAM security tools

---

# EC2

## EC2 instance

## Security group

## SSH EC2

## Spot instance

## Elastic IP

## EC2 Placement groups
